synopsis: In the wake of the death of the Emperor and the destruction of the Death Star II, and immediately following the truce at Bakura, a group of Rebel pilots are looking forward to some well-deserved R & R. Instead, they run into a deadly attack by vengeful Imperials that changes the course of all of their lives. Rev up your engines—it's time for the Rogue Squadron to fly again! Join Luke Skywalker, Wedge Antilles, and the rest of the Rogues on a mission that will define them as heroes not just of the Rebellion, but as heroes for the whole galaxy! A return to one of the most requested story l
title: X-Wing: Rogue Leader #1
